title: Chhattisgarh High Court quashes complaint filed against Chief Justice, other judges by CJM's wife
description: The Chhattisgarh High Court recently quashed a 2016 criminal complaint filed by a former judicial officer's wife against the then Chief Justice Navin Sinha, former judge Justice P Diwaker and several members of the higher judicial service of the State [High Court of Chhattisgarh v State of Chhattisgarh]The complainant Pratibha Gwal stated that her husband, Chief Judicial Magistrate (CJM) Prabhakar Gwal, who was later dismissed from service, in October 2015, was abused by certain persons at a tol
